allow: Bash(python -c "from fastapi.testclient import TestClient; from backend.main import app; c = TestClient\(app\); print\('GET /', c.get\('/'\).status_code, c.get\('/'\).headers.get\('content-type'\)\); print\('GET /health', c.get\('/health'\).json\(\)\); print\('GET /contacts', c.get\('/contacts'\).status_code\); print\('GET /styles.css', c.get\('/styles.css'\).status_code\); print\('GET /app.js', c.get\('/app.js'\).status_code\)")
